sections.paragraph:
(“fear,” “terror”) [Heth], pr.n. of a Canaanite, Gen 10:15, progenitor of the Canaanitish nation bearing the same name [Hittites], sometimes called בְּנֵי חֵת Gen 23:3, seq.; 25:10 (בְּנֹות חֵת 27:46 ); sometimes חִתִּי plur. חִתִּים, inhabiting the neighbourhood of Hebron ( Gen 23:7); Gen 15:20 Deu 7:1 Jos 1:4. מַלְכֵי הַחִתִּים 2Ki 7:6, a name given to all the Canaanitish kings [?].

[“Fem. חִתִּית Eze 16:3, plur. חִתִּיֹּות 1Ki 11:1, also בְּנֹות חֵת Gen 27:46.”]
